title: United States Alien's Change of Address (Form AR-11)
description: Report a change of address to U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services using Form AR-11, as required of most non-citizens within 10 days of moving. This document describes the registrant's identity, the old and new addresses, the move date, and any pending USCIS cases that should also be updated. It does not submit the form; the live uscis.gov source is always authoritative (see verification).

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from the official USCIS AR-11 page and the AR-11 form. The 10-day filing rule, the identity block (name, date of birth, country of birth, A-Number), the old/new address pair, the date of move, and the pending-case reporting were confirmed against the source; individual input fields reflect the form's structure but are not yet independently re-verified item-by-item. The legal 10-day deadline is a temporal rule that v0.1 cannot encode as a constraint and is recorded in field descriptions. Status remains 'draft'. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Family name (last name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Your current legal family name.
fields.sourceRef: AR-11 — Your Full Name: Family Name

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: Given name (first name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: AR-11 — Your Full Name: Given Name

fields.name: middleName
fields.label: Middle name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: AR-11 — Your Full Name: Middle Name

fields.name: otherNamesUsed
fields.label: Other names you have used
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Any other names you have ever used, including aliases and maiden name.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Full date, YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: Country of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: countryOfCitizenship
fields.label: Country of citizenship or nationality
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: alienRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Alien Registration Number (A-Number)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Your USCIS A-Number if you have one: the letter A followed by 7 to 9 digits (e.g. A012345678). Enter the digits with or without the leading A. Some registrants subject to address reporting do not yet have an A-Number.

fields.name: uscisOnlineAccountNumber
fields.label: USCIS Online Account Number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Your 12-digit USCIS Online Account Number, if you have created an online account. Leave blank if you do not have one.

fields.name: oldAddressLine1
fields.label: Previous address — street number and name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The U.S. address you are moving from.

fields.name: oldAddressLine2
fields.label: Previous address — apartment, suite, or unit (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: oldAddressCity
fields.label: Previous address — city or town
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: oldAddressState
fields.label: Previous address — state or territory
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Two-letter USPS state or territory abbreviation when the previous address is in the U.S.; omit for a foreign previous address.

fields.name: oldAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Previous address — ZIP / postal code
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. U.S. 5-digit or ZIP+4 format, e.g. 90210 or 90210-1234, when the previous address is in the U.S.

fields.name: oldAddressCountry
fields.label: Previous address — country
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Country of the previous address.

fields.name: newAddressLine1
fields.label: New address — street number and name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The U.S. address you have moved to.

fields.name: newAddressLine2
fields.label: New address — apartment, suite, or unit (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: newAddressCity
fields.label: New address — city or town
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: newAddressState
fields.label: New address — state or territory
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Two-letter USPS state or territory abbreviation, e.g. CA, NY, TX.

fields.name: newAddressPostalCode
fields.label: New address — ZIP code
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. 5-digit or ZIP+4 format, e.g. 90210 or 90210-1234.

fields.name: dateOfMove
fields.label: Date you moved to the new address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The date you began residing at the new address, YYYY-MM-DD. Federal law requires AR-11 to be filed within 10 days of this date; v0.1 cannot enforce that deadline as a constraint, so consumers should check it against the filing date.

fields.name: hasPendingCase
fields.label: Do you have any application, petition, or request pending with USCIS?
fields.description: If yes, the change of address should also be applied to those cases so notices reach the new address.

fields.name: pendingCaseReceiptNumbers
fields.label: Pending case form types and receipt numbers
fields.description: Required only when hasPendingCase is true. List each pending form type and its receipt number (e.g. 'I-485, IOE0123456789'). A USCIS receipt number is three letters followed by 10 digits.
fields.sourceRef: AR-11 — Pending applications/petitions: form numbers and receipt numbers
